capability_cards.name: Context Caching
capability_cards.description: Improves data retrieval speed by storing the results of expensive queries.
capability_cards.risk: Requires adequate management to avoid stale data.

capability_cards.name: State Fabric Logging
capability_cards.description: Tracks state changes across applications for better debugging.
capability_cards.benefit: Enhanced observability and easier issue resolution.
capability_cards.risk: Overhead in storage and performance if not managed properly.

capability_cards.name: Multi-Provider Dispatch
capability_cards.description: Enables requests to be distributed across multiple providers.

capability_cards.name: Read-Only Cockpit UI
capability_cards.description: Provides a visual representation of system states without altering them.
capability_cards.benefit: Helps users monitor system health at a glance.

capability_cards.name: Cron-based Execution
capability_cards.description: Schedules tasks based on time intervals.
capability_cards.benefit: Automates routine tasks to improve efficiency.
capability_cards.risk: Tasks may overlap or conflict if not carefully scheduled.

capability_cards.name: Real-Time Monitoring
capability_cards.description: Tracks metrics in real-time for immediate visibility.
capability_cards.risk: May require additional resources for setup.

capability_cards.name: User Role Management
capability_cards.description: Controls access permissions for different user roles.
capability_cards.benefit: Increased security and control over system access.
capability_cards.risk: Misconfiguration can lead to unauthorized access.

capability_cards.name: API Rate Limiting
capability_cards.description: Restricts the number of requests to prevent abuse.
capability_cards.risk: Can limit user experience if thresholds are too low.

capability_cards.name: Load Balancing
capability_cards.description: Distributes network traffic across multiple servers.
capability_cards.risk: Requires careful configuration to avoid bottlenecks.

capability_cards.name: Data Encryption
capability_cards.risk: Can add latency if not optimized.

capability_cards.name: Backup Automation
capability_cards.description: Automates the backup process for data integrity.
capability_cards.benefit: Ensures data recovery in case of failure.
capability_cards.risk: Backup errors can lead to data loss.

capability_cards.name: Anomaly Detection
capability_cards.description: Identifies unusual patterns or behaviors in data.
capability_cards.risk: False positives can lead to unnecessary alarms.

application_candidates.description: A dashboard for monitoring key metrics using Read-Only Cockpit UI.
Uses Cron-based Execution to run tests at scheduled intervals.
Monitors API usage patterns using State Fabric Logging.
Utilizes Multi-Provider Dispatch to select the best provider in real time.
Manages user permissions through User Role Management.
Implements Real-Time Monitoring to track application performance.
Uses API Rate Limiting to manage the load on critical services.
Implements Data Encryption for sensitive data transmission.
A UI showing the status of automated backups.
Identifies abnormal behaviors in application performance.
Distributes network traffic using Load Balancing techniques.
Automates the routine cleanup of stale cached data.

sprint_candidates.purpose: Implement Enhanced User Dashboard using Read-Only Cockpit UI.
sprint_candidates.expected_value: Improved visibility into metrics for stakeholders.
sprint_candidates.what_not_to_do: Do not modify existing data structures.

sprint_candidates.purpose: Develop Automated Testing Scheduler leveraging Cron-based Execution.
sprint_candidates.what_not_to_do: Avoid manual intervention in test executions.

sprint_candidates.purpose: Create API Usage Analytics Tool using State Fabric Logging.
sprint_candidates.expected_value: Better insights into API usage and potential optimizations.

sprint_candidates.purpose: Design Traffic Management System with Load Balancing.
sprint_candidates.expected_value: Enhanced reliability and performance under load.
sprint_candidates.what_not_to_do: Avoid introducing single points of failure.

sprint_candidates.purpose: Implement Anomaly Tracker using Real-Time Monitoring.
